name: codex-game-studio
description: A Codex plugin that turns game ideas, design docs, and playable builds into structured studio workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, design, build, test, and ship indie games with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Game Studio adapts the studio-style workflow popularized by Claude Code Game Studios into a compact Codex plugin. It provides focused skills for concept design, production planning, QA, and release readiness without depending on Claude Code slash commands, hooks, or subagents.
defaultPrompt: Plan my next playable game milestone.
Review this game concept and find risks.
Create a QA checklist for my build.
